Appearances:
Plaintiff Polk Senior Housing Associates rep, present
Attorney, Jak Steven Marquez, Esq., appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Franklin Buchanon, is present.
Attorney, Aaron Morrison, Esq. representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Stan Bair, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 306, for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of NOV-1-2010 is vacated.
